results.engine_gap: damage-prevention replacement effect (prevent damage from creatures to you/your creatures this turn); requires DAMAGE event prevention/replacement layer
results.notes: No prevention infrastructure for source-type-conditional damage.

results.engine_gap: numeric choice (0-10) + sweep by power threshold; needs PendingChoice variant that returns an integer
results.notes: Numeric-input choice subsystem missing.

results.engine_gap: Role aura tokens (Cursed Role makes target 1/1 base) and {2}-more flash alt cost
results.notes: Role tokens are an unimplemented enchantment-aura class with state-replacing P/T.

results.engine_gap: Bargain alt cost (sacrifice as you cast) is unimplemented; no detectable bargained flag in resolve context for top-N look + put-2-in-hand
results.notes: Could partially wire the non-bargained branch, but the spell's branch is the entire effect.

results.engine_gap: n/a
results.notes: Bespoke chain: DRAW 3 + OBJECT_CREATED for 1/1 blue Faerie token with flying. Ignores 'can block only flyers' restriction (cosmetic for AI).

results.engine_gap: n/a
results.notes: Inline _phase2b_make_draw_resolve(2, ...) helper (worktree branch lacks spell_resolve module).

results.engine_gap: Look-top-N + reveal+keep-one is an engine gap; approximated as scry 1 + draw 1 (decision space is equivalent for AI/auto)
results.notes: Bespoke SCRY 1 + DRAW 1 approximation.

results.engine_gap: Bargain alt cost; conditional 'put onto battlefield instead of hand' branch
results.notes: Resolution depends entirely on the bargained flag.

results.engine_gap: Bargain + tutor + cast-without-paying-from-exile (mv<=4) chain
results.notes: Tutor is doable, but cast-without-paying free-cast subsystem is not generally available.

results.engine_gap: Reveal-then-choose-by-opponent UX is partially supported via DISCARD payload chosen_by/nonland_only flags; conditional self-exile maps to DISCARD with discard_to_exile flag
results.notes: Bespoke: REVEAL_HAND + DISCARD with chosen_by=caster + nonland_only; if you don't control a Faerie, additionally DISCARD self with discard_to_exile=True. Engine handlers may treat these flags as best-effort hints.

results.engine_gap: Sacrifice variable number of artifact/enchantment/token permanents → reanimate the same number; requires interactive multi-sacrifice picker tied to subsequent reanimate count
results.notes: No 'pick N sacrificeables, then return N from gy' subsystem.

results.engine_gap: X-spell handling depends on stack_manager.x_value lookup; cant_block on tokens is an informational payload key the engine may or may not enforce.
results.notes: Bespoke: read X via state.stack_manager.items, emit X OBJECT_CREATED for 1/1 black Rat tokens, then GRANT_KEYWORD haste to all creatures the caster controls.

results.engine_gap: Look-top-5 + reveal-creature-and-take + bottom-rest pattern; impulse-look-and-reveal is unimplemented
results.notes: Could approximate as scry-many but loses the reveal-only-creature semantics.

results.engine_gap: Monster Role aura tokens + delayed fight trigger 'when you do'
results.notes: Role tokens not implemented.

results.engine_gap: Look-top-5 + exile + grant-cast-from-exile-this-turn + delayed combat-phase trigger to fight
results.notes: Multiple gap layers: exile-look, cast-from-exile permission, delayed combat trigger.

results.engine_gap: Multi-target fight (any-number-of enchanted creatures + 1 creature each fight one target)
results.notes: Engine FIGHT pairs only two creatures; no group-fight resolution.

results.engine_gap: Bargain + look-top-20 + reveal-up-to-2-creatures + (battlefield if bargained, hand otherwise)
results.notes: Branches entirely on bargained; cheating into play is also a gap.

results.engine_gap: Per-opponent token creation tied to whether each opponent had a creature returned by the bounce; requires post-bounce introspection of which players' creatures moved
results.notes: Could bounce all creatures, but the per-opponent rider requires tracking which opponents lost a creature.

results.engine_gap: Cost-reduction (per attacker this turn) is a separate cost-time engine gap; the resolve itself is just draw 3.
results.notes: Inline _phase2b_make_draw_resolve(3, ...) helper. Cost reduction is unimplemented but card resolves correctly at face cost.

results.engine_gap: Monster Role aura tokens (engine gap) + 1-or-2 target multimodal targeting
results.notes: Role tokens not implemented; haste grant alone is doable but the Role tokens dominate the card.
